name: word-research

description: Research words and discover whether they have been searched before on wordresearch.xyz
author: 0xdhrv

commands.name: discover-word
commands.title: Discover Word
commands.subtitle: Word Research
commands.description: Check if a word has been discovered before

commands.name: view-stats
commands.title: Word Stats
commands.subtitle: Word Research
commands.description: View top words and stats from Word Research

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
